calendar.matters:
Petition To Appoint A Trustee Successor
Off Calendar Mar-25-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Amy Harrington appeared via zoom for and with Debra Cournale (temporary successor trustee).

Ms. Harrington stated that she doesn't have a formal appraisal, that she estimates value of total bond should be $875,000.00, that there is no cash on hand just real property and unclaimed property, and that she is willing to see if parties will waive bond. Also, she will file a verified declaration of value today. Petition to appoint a successor trustee is taken under submission.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Singh: Not reported.

EX PARTE PETITION TO APPOINT A TEMPORARY SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2024 Granted Per Written Order
